# batch & pipeline: selector (ids | stdin - | --filter), --ids, bulk tag/rm, --dry-run
mkdir proj
cd proj
exec mtt init
stdout 'initialized'

exec mtt add --type epic 'alpha'
stdout 'created e1'
exec mtt add --type epic 'beta'
stdout 'created e2'
exec mtt add --type task --parent e1 'child'
stdout 'created t1'

# manual tag x on the two epics (not text-anchored -> bulk-removable)
exec mtt tag add e1 x
stdout 'tagged e1: x'
exec mtt tag add e2 x
stdout 'tagged e2: x'

# --ids: one id per line, honoring the --tag filter
exec mtt list --tag x --ids
stdout '(?m)^e1$'
stdout '(?m)^e2$'
! stdout '(?m)^t1$'

# --ids and --json are mutually exclusive
! exec mtt list --tag x --ids --json
stderr 'mutually exclusive'

# pipeline (testscript has no shell pipes): capture ids -> stdin -> bulk tag rm
exec mtt list --tag x --ids
cp stdout ids.txt
stdin ids.txt
exec mtt tag rm x -
stdout 'untagged 2 task\(s\)'
exec mtt list --tag x --ids
! stdout 'e1'

# filter source: bulk tag add over --status tbd (all three tasks are tbd)
exec mtt tag add y --status tbd
stdout 'tagged 3 task\(s\)'
exec mtt list --tag y --ids
stdout '(?m)^e1$'
stdout '(?m)^t1$'

# --dry-run: preview a bulk rm without deleting
exec mtt rm --tag y --dry-run
stdout '(?m)^e1$'
stderr 'would affect 3 task\(s\)'
exec mtt show e1
stdout 'e1  epic'

# bulk rm subgraph: e1 + its child t1 in one call, no --force (in-set ref ignored)
exec mtt rm e1 t1
stdout 'removed 2 task\(s\)'
! exec mtt show e1
stderr 'not found'
! exec mtt show t1
stderr 'not found'

# empty selector (no match) is a no-op, exit 0
exec mtt rm --status nonesuch

# conflict: two sources -> usage error (non-zero)
! exec mtt rm e2 --status tbd
stderr 'one source'

# partial failure: stdin with a real id and a missing one -> exit 1, missing reported
# (badids.txt is unpacked into $WORK; we are in $WORK/proj)
stdin $WORK/badids.txt
! exec mtt tag add z -
stderr 't99'
stdout 'tagged 1 task\(s\): e2'

-- badids.txt --
e2
t99
